title: San Francisco’s Luxury Housing Boom Is a Warning
description: San Francisco’s luxury housing market is booming, fueled by the stunning wealth created by the nascent artificial intelligence industry and a record stock market. Sure, the California city has always been an outlier relative to the rest of the real estate market, but the recent developments nevertheless suggest the modest gains in affordability we’ve seen in the US may be nipped in the bud.

title: Lake Tahoe Power Crunch Shows AI’s Growing Energy Toll in West
description: Lake Tahoe has long been a refuge for Silicon Valley’s tech elite, from Mark Zuckerberg to Larry Ellison. Now the artificial intelligence boom behind much of that wealth is straining the region’s power market, pushing up costs for residents in the lakeside towns below.

title: Why Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Joined Trump's High
description: Discover why Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang joined Donald Trump’s high-stakes visit to China as AI rivalry with Beijing intensifies. Explore how US export curbs on advanced Nvidia chips, the Trump-Xi summit, and China’s $50 billion AI market are reshaping the global semiconductor and artificial intelligence landscape.

title: China tech giant Tencent sees Q1 profit jump after AI bets
description: Tencent reported a 21% surge in quarterly net profit, reaching 58.1 billion yuan, driven by significant investments in the booming artificial intelligence sector. The tech giant is actively competing in AI, unveiling model upgrades and reportedly considering investments in startups, despite rising AI costs impacting margins.

title: How AI Is Reshaping the World of Data Centres

title: AI models predict sudden cardiac arrest risk using health records
description: Researchers have developed artificial intelligence (AI) models that can scrutinize electronic health records (EHR) and electrocardiograms to identify individuals in the general population at elevated risk for sudden cardiac arrest - a condition that causes more than 400,000 U.S. deaths annually and has a survival rate of only 10%.

title: Anthropic’s valuation nears $1 trillion as AI boom fuels record revenue growth
description: Claude maker sees explosive rise in private market value amid investor rush into artificial intelligence firms.
content: Anthropic, the artificial intelligence company behind the Claude chatbot, is reportedly approaching a market-implied valuation of nearly USD 1 trillion, marking one of the fastest rises in Silicon Valley history. Investor interest in the company has ... [1935 chars]

description: Artificial intelligence algorithms are coming to some of the most valuable real estate in retail: the Amazon.com Inc. search bar.
content:

title: Notable Researchers Join $4 Billion Effort to Build Self-Improving A.I.
description: Recursive Superintelligence, founded by former Google, Meta and OpenAI researchers, is part of a growing effort to automate the creation of artificial intelligence.
